CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_date Date DEFAULT toDate('2021-01-01'));
WITH event_date AS (SELECT event_date FROM test_dates) SELECT subtractTupleOfIntervals(event_date, (INTERVAL 1 MONTH, INTERVAL 1 DAY)) FROM event_date;
WITH toDate('2025-05-01') AS date, (SELECT (INTERVAL element DAY) FROM intervals ARRAY JOIN intervals) AS interval_tuple SELECT subtractTupleOfIntervals(date, interval_tuple) FROM intervals;
WITH (toDate('2020-01-01') + INTERVAL 1 YEAR) AS start_date, (INTERVAL 1 MONTH, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS interval_tuple SELECT subtractTupleOfIntervals(start_date, interval_tuple);
SELECT date_value, subtractTupleOfIntervals(date_value, (INTERVAL 1 YEAR, INTERVAL 2 MONTH)) FROM sample_dates ORDER BY date_value;
WITH toDateTime('2024-08-15 10:30:00') AS dt SELECT subtractTupleOfIntervals(dt, (INTERVAL 1 HOUR, INTERVAL 30 MINUTE));
WITH (SELECT toDate('2021-07-20')) AS my_date SELECT subtractTupleOfIntervals(my_date, (INTERVAL 5 DAY, INTERVAL 1 MONTH));
